real_interview.content: <synch>

IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
<laughter>
yes
okay_confirm (okay)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
i'm doing good
thats_good (that's good)
where_originally (where are you from originally)
i'm originally from southern california
really (really)
like_about_LA (what are some things you really like about l_a)
i like the um downtown theater district i like the beaches i i like the variety of stuff that you can do in one day
mhm (mhm)
<clears throat>
dont_like_LA (what are some things you don't really like about l_a)
hmm
well sometimes i don't like the traffic
i don't think there's really too much i don't like about l_a i really do like l_a though
okay_confirm (okay)
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
<laughter>
no i i haven't really traveled in about um five years
why2 (why)
oh i just haven't been able to travel um
i just haven't traveled <laughter>
okay_confirm (okay)
travel_changed (what do you enjoy about traveling)
<deep breath> um i like going to new places and seeing things i haven't seen before and if i can like visiting um
places like landmarks
travel_trips (i'd love to hear about one of your trips)
well the last one i did was san francisco that wasn't so far but i got to stay in downtown san francisco and i got to go shopping
and i got to get on a um the street car so that was cool
nice (nice)
xxx
study (what did you study at school)
well i still study i'm studying psychology
sounds_interesting (that sounds interesting)
mhm
hard_decision (how did you decide to do that)
hmm
well <sigh>
i decided to go back to school um just pretty quickly so i went to junior college
and then when it got close to graduate i knew i wanna transfer so
i'd taken a a couple psychology courses and i decided i liked it so i just decided to make that my major
and it
i thought it didn't have a lot of math but it had
enough math <laughter> so
yeah3 (yeah)
happy_didthat (are you happy you did that)
<deep breath> mm <sigh> well now that i'm almost done
i don't know if i'm gonna continue in that area
understand (i understand)
dream_job (what's your dream job)
well what i wanted initially was to um <sigh> get into sports psychology but i'm not
quite sure that's what i want either
okay_confirm (okay)
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
well
i could be shy initially but um once you get to know me i'm outgoing
relax_fishtank (sometimes when i'm feeling tense i turn on the fish tank screensaver hey i know it's not hawaii but it's the best i've got what do you do to relax)
<laughter>
<laughter>
<sigh> i think i either go to sleep eat something really really good or watch something on netflix
like_what (like what)
well just a good movie i like foreign movies a lot um so a lotta
right now i'm into um martial arts movie with subtitles so
cool3 (cool)
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
i think i'm pretty good
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
hmm
you know i know

they're not really long arguments i don't know if they're real arguments i know i argued with my boyfriend um <laughter> 'cause he hung up in my face but i don't know why and it got solved pretty quickly so i don't know if it was really that important
okay_confirm (okay)
wait i walked out without say oh okay
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
hmm
i can't think of one right now
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
<sigh>
i think
the hardest decision i probably had to make
was moving
from well back to california from oregon
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
well i was really young so i was um
nineteen twenty-ish and i was really by myself so that was pretty hard 'cause obviously i had to support myself
change_directions (what made you decide to do that)
because it was really really boring in oregon so um i really like the activity here in l_a
see_mean (i see what you mean)
feelguilty (what's something you feel guilty about)
you know i don't really feel guilty about many things
okay_confirm (okay)
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
well i don't talk to them that much um my dad my stepmom live in oregon so i probably talk to 'em on the phone at least once or twice a month
and then when they come out here i wanna say at least once a year sometimes it can be twice you know occasionally more but not too often then i see them
um
that's about it but i'm pretty much the only one out here my brother is also up there as well
yeah
mhm (mhm)
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
hmm
well i've had lots of positive influences i think um
just regular people i come across you know maybe someone i've worked with maybe
um like oh actually my uncle he's a really good positive influence he um he knows quite a bit has lots of good advice
like_what (like what)
mm about <bout> life
okay_confirm (okay)
memory_erase (tell me about an event or something that you wish you could erase from your memory)
hmm
you know i don't really think i've had anything that bad happen to me where i just don't uh
where it bothers me so much i have to not think about it
okay_confirm (okay)
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
pretty <pret>
well i can't say pretty easy 'cause i work odd schedule and then i go to school but um
yeah if i wanna go to sleep i sleep really well though as long as i have enough you know hours
thats_good (that's good)
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
really really happy and good
good_hear (that's so good to hear)
<laughter>
ptsd_diagnosed (have you ever been diagnosed with p_t_s_d)
nope
depression_diagnosed (have you been diagnosed with depression)
no
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
<deep breath>
i'm always happy uh <laughter> gosh yesterday
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
um i'm just happy any time i talk to my boyfriend or if i go out and do something i'm just happy um i got off work i'm happy 'cause i'm done for the day i'm just really happy
um i'm on spring break i'm really happy right now so
awesome (awesome)
Ellie17Dec2012_10 (tell me about something you did recently that you really enjoyed)
<deep breath> hmm <sigh>
oh i haven't done like any really extremely fun activities unless you consider going out to eat
but the last activity
that i had a lot of fun doing was ice skating um in december downtown <dow> in downtown l_a
wow (wow)
regret (is there anything you regret)
no i don't really have too many regrets i mean whatever happens happens and you know it was meant to play out that way
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
hmm
well um
i guess i would say don't worry too much about the small things um
even though they seem really big it really they really are insignificant and uh
you won't think about it six months from now
okay_confirm (okay)
Ellie17Dec2012_07 (what would you say are some of your best qualities)
i think my
best qualities are i'm a happy person i'm a fun person i'm pretty easy to get along with i think most people like me
and i'm just a cool person
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
hmm well i wish i could study more i wish i would study more
i wish that uh <sigh> i would exercise more
and i wish that uh that's
yeah i think that's it right there
feelbadly (tell me about a time when someone made you feel really badly about yourself)
hmm
<sigh>
i don't think i wanna talk about that
okay_confirm (okay)
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
hmm
i don't know i guess uh just taking care of myself supporting myself not having to go back home i guess that's about the best accomplishment there is
thats_great (that's great)
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
thank you
bye (goodbye)
bye
